titleStmt.title: SII 9.471: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 471. (A.R. No. 421 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE TEMPLE OF VENKATARAMANA AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1404, Pramōdūta, Vaiśākha, śu. 1. Śaka 1404 corresponded to the cyclic year Śubhakṛit in which year the details cited give the equivalent A.D. 1482 April 19 Friday (not verifiable). It refers itself to the reign of Bhujabala-Narasiṅgarāya-Mahārāya and states that when Mallapa-Nāyaka, brother of Sōmaṇṇa-Nāyaka of Kuṟugōḍ, was ruling over the Bārakūra-rājya, a number of residents of Basaṟūr made gifts of land and money for the service of the god Tirumaladēva at the Paḍuvakēri of Basaṟūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1403
saṁdu nālkaneya vartamāna pramōdūtasaṁvatsarada vayiśākha śu 1
lū śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīra bhujabala narasiṁgarāyamahārāyarū vijayanagariya siṁ
hāsanadalū sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda sakalasāṁbrājyavanu
pratipālisuva kāladalu Avara nirūpadinda kuṟugōḍa sōmaṁ
ṇanāyakara ta(ṁ)mma mallapanāyakaru bārakkūra rājyavanāḷuva kāla
dali basaṟūra paḍuvakēriya tirumaladēvarige Amrutapaḍige Ācaṁdrārkavā
gi paḍuvakēriya halarū māḍida dharmada vivara hiriyakuduralū paḍuva kudu
ralū A ra catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu harida hoḷeyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu
harida hoḷeyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu Uḍupabaṭṭara gaḍiyiṁda Aṟiyikali
ṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu harida sāliṁda teṁkalu yī nālku catuḥsīmeyiṁda vo
ḷage Uḷḷa monera maṁjana kayyali mūlava koṁḍa kaḷi sahavāgi halara bageya kaḷi
hoḷe Uṁṭādadanu . gaddeya māḍi bittuva bījavari muḍi 30 A mūvattu mu
ḍi gadege gēṇi nālvaṁḍeyalū Akki ha Ēḷuvare hāneyali muḍi 75 A
kṣāradalū Eppattayidu muḍi Akkiyanū Āmrutapaḍige Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi
naḍavaṁtāgi halaru seṭṭikāṟaru māḍida dhar(ṁ)maśāsana muṁcama voḷage
bāgaḍaseṭṭaya tirumaseṭi tirumaladēvarige dharmakke biṭṭa bāḷu gade muḍi 3
mūṟu muḍi gadeya gēṇi Akki nālvaṁḍeyalu mu 8 mattaṁ tirumaladēvarige kōcase
ṭṭiya nāraṇaseṭṭiya saṁtānadavaru māḍida dharmakke biṭṭa bāḷu muḍi 1 . 0 Aṟu
vattuhāne gadege gēṇi Akki mu 2 mattaṁ tirumaladēvarige tiṁmayyagaḷu Uḍupabha
ṭṭaru koṁmeyabhaṭṭarige yikarttarigū mayisālavāgi koṭṭa doḍḍavaraha ga 82
. 0 Akṣāradalū EṁbhattaEraḍuvare varaha māḍikoṁḍa kaḷiyanu rūpu mā
ḍida gade mū 12 A haṁneraḍu mūḍi gadege nāghaṁḍugadalu A mu 21 Ā
Uḍupabhaṭṭarū kommeyabhaṭṭaru yī sarvasva bēkeṁdu baha kālakke Ā mayisā
lada varahanū A kaḷiyanū kaḍidu gaddeya krutavanū nālvattu hānagadege mū
ṟu varahanavōpādiyalū Ā ṭhāvili sasiya naṭṭare sasige nālku haṇa geṁḍege vo
ṁdu hoṁnina vōpādiyalū Uḍupabhaṭṭarū kommayabhaṭṭarū koṭu ba
haru hiriyakuduroḷage halaru koṭṭa hosakaḷiyoḷage kokoci tiṁmaOḍeya
rige gadde muḍi 3 Adaṟa paḍuvottira sōmōparāgapuṁṇyakāladalu tiṁmayya
gaḷu nāgaṇasēnabōvarige koṭadu . bitu gade mu 3 seṭikāṟa ciṁmaseṭiyaru māḍida dhar(ṁ)ma
paḍuvakuduralū nāraṇamogarana mūlagade mū 4 vāstēva maṁjaṇa biṁdamaṁjana mūla
gade mu 4 . 0 Eraḍubageya Āruvāra Ardha kāṭihoṁnu ga 213 mattaṁ Aṁtararuvā
ra gade ma 1 . 0 ge Ārdhavaraha ga 16 . mataṁ mūḍakuduralū Uḍupabhaṭṭara hoṁ
nūga 150 yidake teṟu kōṭināthadēvarige dēvasva 2 Aṁtu nālku bageyalu Akki mu 24 A
mrutapaḍi nayivēdyake māḍi dharma Ā kuduravoḷage Ardha Aruvāra mūlādi mayisāla jaṁna sarva
sva Ellavanū mādaseṭi sahitavāgi Ardha baṁdaru vriti baṁdarū tirumaladēvarige Uḷadeṁdu
barasikoṭa śāsana . mataṁ sāyināra baḷiya kupaṇakaṁbaḷi koṭadu bitugade mūlada bāḷu
3 ke gēṇi Aki mu 3 mataṁ Aṁṇiseṭiya mādaseṭi māḍidu Amrutapaḍi nayivēdyake kupaṇakaṁbaḷi
ya Aḷiya yīsarahegaḍeya mūla mādaseṭiyu Adiyāgi māḍikoṁḍa gade bittuvadu mu 15
ge koṭa varaha ga 70 ge baḍi Aki nāghaṁḍugadali mu 16 mattaṁ Uḍupabhaṭṭa koṁmebhaṭṭara mūla māda
seṭi Aṣṭaguṇavāgi māḍikoṁḍa gade mu 6 ke gēṇi Akki mu 9 mattaṁ Ayiduvare tāre yīsaraseṭi kaṁ
dāurada Atiyakoḍala kāmauḍupara mūlada bāḷu bayalu meke maki sahita bittuva mu 1
Aruvāravāgi koṭa varaha ga 36 yidake gēṇi Akki mu 7 yī AkiU keṟeya Uraṁdāvanake
māḍida darma mataṁ narabuna baḷiya tiṁmayyaseṭi māḍi dharma bhēri jēgaṭe kēsa kaṁcu muṭa
ge māḍidu muguvina voḷage traseyali Aṁtabhaṭa sidappabhaṭanavara mūlada bhāḷa mēle ceṁnavarada
tiṁmayaseṭiya māvandaru saṁkaraseṭi nāraṇaseṭiyavaru koṭa kāṭihoṁnu 110 yidake
baḍi nāghaṁḍugadali Akki muḍi 9 �yo AkiU tirumaladēvara dharmake naḍaudu .
Digital edition of SII 9.471 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
